novel_features.name: Campaign Performance Dashboard
novel_features.description: See which marketing campaigns drive the most clicks, leads, and sales — aggregated by tag across all your links
novel_features.rationale: Requires local join across links, analytics, and tags that no single API call provides — Dub's analytics groupBy lacks a tag dimension

novel_features.name: Attribution Funnel
novel_features.description: Track click-to-lead-to-sale conversion rates per campaign or link to see where prospects drop off
novel_features.rationale: Requires correlating events by customer across multiple links — only possible with all data in one local store

novel_features.name: Tag Analytics Rollup
novel_features.description: Compare performance across all tags to find which campaigns and categories drive the most conversions
novel_features.rationale: Dub's analytics API groups by link, country, or device — but not by tag. Only a local SQLite join can aggregate analytics per tag

novel_features.name: Customer Journey Timeline
novel_features.description: See every link a customer clicked, when they became a lead, and when they purchased — in one timeline
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining customers, events, and links across the full interaction history — no existing tool assembles this view

novel_features.name: Link Health Audit
novel_features.description: Find links with declining or zero click velocity over time so you can clean up dead campaigns
novel_features.rationale: Requires historical click time series stored locally — the API only returns current totals, not velocity trends

novel_features.name: Partner Leaderboard
novel_features.description: Rank partners by commission earned, conversion rate, and clicks generated to find your top performers
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining partners, commissions, and analytics across all partner links — no single API call provides this comparison

novel_features.name: Domain Utilization Report
novel_features.description: See which custom domains are over- or underused with links-per-domain and click distribution breakdown
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining domains, links, and analytics in a local store — Dub's dashboard shows per-link, not per-domain aggregation
